* {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|ja|須々岐水神社 (松本市)}} (すすきがわじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|ja|松本市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. The registered name of the religious corporation is '''須須岐水神社'''. * {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)}} (すすきみずじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|ja|千曲市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
{{Aimai}}

* {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|ja|須々岐水神社 (松本市)}} (すすきがわじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|ja|松本市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. The registered name of the religious corporation is '''須須岐水神社'''. * {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)}} (すすきみずじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|ja|千曲市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
{{Aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Susukigawa Shrine''' (須須岐水神社) is the name of a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}}.
* {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|ja|須々岐水神社 (松本市)|12=draft}} (すすきがわじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|ja|松本市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}. The registered name of the religious corporation is '''須須岐水神社'''. * {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)|12=draft}} (すすきみずじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|ja|千曲市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}.
{{Aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Susukigawa Shrine''' (須須岐水神社) is the name of a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|ja|須々岐水神社 (松本市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|qq=}} (すすきがわじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Matsumoto, Nagano|Matsumoto, Nagano]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. The registered name of the religious corporation is '''須須岐水神社'''. * {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|qq=}} (すすきみずじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Chikuma, Nagano|Chikuma, Nagano]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|須須岐水神社|version=75185916|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[simple:user:immanuelle/須須岐水神社]] [[ja:須須岐水神社]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:須須岐水神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:須須岐水神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:須須岐水神社]]
'''Susukigawa Shrine''' (須須岐水神社) is the name of a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}.
* {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|ja|須々岐水神社 (松本市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|1=Susukigisui Shrine (Matsumoto City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11664481}} (すすきがわじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|en|Matsumoto, Nagano|WD=Q213324|lt=Matsumoto, Nagano|1=Matsumoto, Nagano}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. The registered name of the religious corporation is '''須須岐水神社'''. * {{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susukigawa Shrine (Chikuma)|1=Susu Kizumi Shrine (Chikuma City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85884529}} (すすきみずじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|en|Chikuma, Nagano|WD=Q179757|lt=Chikuma, Nagano|1=Chikuma, Nagano}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.
